title: Clarify Antigravity startup behavior and integration path
description: Holistic currently documents the desired Antigravity startup contract, but one-time repo initialization does not itself guarantee that Antigravity IDE will ask the user what to do on repo open. Preserve this gap as follow-up work so the next session can either tighten the docs or implement a real Antigravity startup integration if one exists.
acceptance_criteria: Docs no longer imply one-time init alone guarantees Antigravity auto-resume; or a real Antigravity startup hook/workspace automation is identified and integrated.
